Functions to get, set, and check if the last installed app is a watchface.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that manages the state of the last installed application within a software development kit (SDK) environment. It includes the header files `shell_sdk.h` and `process_management/app_install_manager.h` to access necessary declarations and functions. The file defines a global variable `s_last_installed_app` of type `AppInstallId`, initialized to `INSTALL_ID_INVALID`, to store the identifier of the last installed application. The function [`shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app`](<#shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app>) returns the current value of `s_last_installed_app`, while [`shell_sdk_set_last_installed_app`](<#shell_sdk_set_last_installed_app>) updates this variable with a new application ID. The function [`shell_sdk_last_installed_app_is_watchface`](<#shell_sdk_last_installed_app_is_watchface>) checks if the last installed application is a watchface by calling `app_install_is_watchface` with the current application ID.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `shell_sdk.h`
- `process_management/app_install_manager.h`


# Global Variables

---
### s\_last\_installed\_app
- **Type**: ``AppInstallId``
- **Description**: Stores the identifier of the last application that was installed. It is initialized to `INSTALL_ID_INVALID`, indicating no valid application has been installed yet.
- **Use**: Used to track and retrieve the identifier of the most recently installed application.


# Functions

---
### shell\_sdk\_get\_last\_installed\_app<!-- {{#callable:shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/shell/sdk/shell_sdk.c#L23>)

Returns the identifier of the last installed application.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Accesses the global variable `s_last_installed_app`.
    - Returns the value of `s_last_installed_app`.
- **Output**: The function returns an `AppInstallId`, which is the identifier of the last installed application.

### shell\_sdk\_set\_last\_installed\_app<!-- {{#callable:shell_sdk_set_last_installed_app}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/shell/sdk/shell_sdk.c#L27>)

Sets the global variable `s_last_installed_app` to the given `app_id`.
- **Inputs**:
    - `app_id`: The identifier of the app to set as the last installed app.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Assigns the value of `app_id` to the global variable `s_last_installed_app`.
- **Output**: None


---
### shell\_sdk\_last\_installed\_app\_is\_watchface<!-- {{#callable:shell_sdk_last_installed_app_is_watchface}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/shell/sdk/shell_sdk.c#L31>)

Checks if the last installed application is a watchface.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls `shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app()` to retrieve the ID of the last installed application.
    - Passes the retrieved application ID to `app_install_is_watchface()` to determine if it is a watchface.
    - Returns the result of `app_install_is_watchface()`.
- **Output**: Returns `true` if the last installed application is a watchface, otherwise returns `false`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app`](<#shell_sdk_get_last_installed_app>)
